texto: I feel that I am merely an agent, giving you some keys that have been given to me to pass on to you. These keys are to unlock doors out of your present prison. Doors opening onto new vistas. Doors beyond where you are now.
explicacao: Citação de John C. Lilly sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I feel that I am merely an agent, giving you some keys that have been given to me to pass on to y…” articula reflexao, consciousness, doors em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
